title: stelis suborbiculata
intro: Stelis suborbiculata is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stelis suborbiculata include reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
